title: RA: Datapacks and Mods
description: A Random Assortment of datapacks and mods
body:
**This modpack is the first in a series called "Random Assortment" where you can probably guess, there will be a pretty random assortment of mods (and in this case datapacks) with a specific theme.**

**A few of the features in this:**
1. New flower pots! ([Beautify: Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated))
2. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) for performance, [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) for shaders, and other mods like those!
3. A new item list like JEI ([EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi))
4. And many, many more. You can play to find out what!

**If you want a full mod list, look at the modpack's dependencies. You can find the dependencies if you click on the most recent version of the modpack.**
